ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each BCI session */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email of the user participating in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session ended */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task performed during the session */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the session */,
  "session_device_id" TEXT /* ID of the BCI device used during the session */,
  "session_software_version" TEXT /* Version of the BCI software used */,
  "session_environment" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_email FOREIGN KEY ("user_email") REFERENCES users ("user_email"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_task_type FOREIGN KEY ("task_type") REFERENCES tasks ("task_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point entry */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Reference to the BCI session this data point belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data point was recorded */,
  "framecount" INTEGER /* Frame count of the data point entry */,
  "bci_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the BCI reading */,
  "bci_state" TEXT /* State of the BCI at the time of recording */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data point */,
  "data_channel" TEXT /* Channel or sensor from which the data was collected */,
  "data_frequency" REAL /* Sampling frequency of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_bci_confidence FOREIGN KEY ("bci_confidence") REFERENCES bci_confidence_levels ("confidence_level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_bci_state FOREIGN KEY ("bci_state") REFERENCES bci_states ("state_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email of the user, serving as a unique identifier */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered for the BCI system */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "user_contact" TEXT /* Contact information (phone, address) */,
  "user_consent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has given consent for data collection */,
  "user_health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_email")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task type */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  "task_duration" INTEGER /* Expected duration of the task in minutes */,
  "task_difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the task */,
  "task_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives or goals of the task */,
  "task_required_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment required for the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bci_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BCI state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the BCI state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the BCI state */,
  "state_color" TEXT /* Color code for the state */,
  "state_priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bci_confidence_levels" (
  "confidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence level entry */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level ranging from 0.0 to 1.0 */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or meaning of the confidence level */,
  "confidence_color" TEXT /* Color code for the confidence level */,
  "confidence_category" TEXT /* Category of the confidence level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confidence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "log_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "log_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  "log_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the system */,
  "log_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_email FOREIGN KEY ("user_email") REFERENCES users ("user_email")
)
